toolPurpose: Retrieve all audience lists (segments) in Mailchimp account with subscriber counts, creation dates, and campaign defaults.

count.description: Number of lists to return (max 1000, default 10)

offset.description: Number of lists to skip for pagination (default 0)

toolPurpose: Retrieve members/subscribers of a specific audience list with optional filtering by status (subscribed, unsubscribed, cleaned, pending).

list_id.description: Unique ID of the audience list (required)

status.description: Filter members by subscription status: subscribed, unsubscribed, cleaned, pending, transactional, or all

count.description: Number of members to return (max 1000, default 10)

offset.description: Number of members to skip for pagination (default 0)

toolPurpose: List campaigns with optional filtering by status (save, sent, sending, paused) and type (regular, plaintext, absplit, rss, variate).

status.description: Filter campaigns by status: sent, sending, paused, schedule, save, or all

type.description: Filter campaigns by type: regular, plaintext, absplit, rss, variate, or all

count.description: Number of campaigns to return (max 1000, default 10)

offset.description: Number of campaigns to skip for pagination (default 0)

sort_direction.description: Sort direction: DESC (newest first) or ASC (oldest first)

toolPurpose: Retrieve detailed performance report for a specific campaign including opens, clicks, bounces, unsubscribes, and other engagement metrics.

campaign_id.description: Unique ID of the campaign to report on (required)

include_unsubscribe_reasons.description: Include unsubscribe reasons in the report (default false)

include_member_activity.description: Include individual member activity data (default false)

toolPurpose: Search for members across all audience lists by email address or name. Returns matching subscribers with their list memberships and engagement history.

query.description: Search query: email address (exact or partial) or subscriber name (required)

list_id.description: Optional: restrict search to a specific list ID. If omitted, searches across all lists.

fields.description: Optional: specific fields to return in results (e.g., 'email_address', 'status', 'merge_fields')
